dangerZone.title: Delete account
dangerZone.description: Permanently remove your account and user-bound data. You have 3 days to cancel. During that time your profile is hidden from the leaderboard.
dangerZone.confirmDelete: Schedule account deletion? Your profile will be hidden from the leaderboard for 3 days, then your account will be permanently deleted. You can cancel anytime before then.
dangerZone.confirmCancel: Cancel scheduled account deletion and restore your account?
